Marin County Perinatal Services Network
The Marin County Perinatal Services Network (PSN) is a collaborative group of local healthcare providers and community-based organizations working together to improve the systems of care for mothers and babies in Marin. The group was established in 2011 and convenes regularly to identify and address current and emergent perinatal health issues. If you or your organization would like to get involved please contact Susan Whalen (
susan.whalen@marincounty.
gov
).
Contact Information
For more information about the Perinatal Service Network or to request an addition or change to the Service Guide please contact:
Susan Whalen
, Senior Program Coordinator
